fixtures.description: Coverage of all three SignerStatus members in a single keyring.
Two signers referencing the same key_ref — KR-2 fires as a soft warning (rotation overlap windows are legitimate). Distinct signer_id keeps KR-1 satisfied.
Keyring with a single active signer; minimal fields populated.

Coverage of all 4 SignatureType members in a single keyring (attestation, authorization, commitment, dev_signature). dev_signature MUST be rejected by consumers in production environments per the SignerEntry doc-comment.
Keyring with three signers, one revoked. Status orthogonality with AgentLifecycleState.
Active + expired pair representing a weekly key rotation: the prior key is expired (no new signatures accepted) but its past signatures remain verifiable.
Signer carrying the v8.5.0 EXTEND fields (D-007): match_strategy=exact, precedence_score=800.
Signer carrying match_strategy=subset (the v8.4.0-compat default; trust profile must include every required scope).
Signer with match_strategy=superset; rule applies when its required scopes are a subset of the trust profile.
Two signers with distinct precedence_score values (900 vs 200) — consumer policy resolves rule overlap by preferring the higher score.
Unknown top-level property — additionalProperties: false rejects it.
Two signers with identical signer_id — KR-1 cross-field validator fails-closed at error severity.
Empty signers array — minItems:1 violation.
contract_version violates the semver pattern ^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$ (missing PATCH).
created_at violates the date-time format (not ISO 8601).
keyring_id is not a UUID v4 format.
org_id is not a UUID v4 — format violation.
keyring_id field omitted — schema requires the field.
org_id field omitted — schema requires the field.
signers field omitted — schema requires the field.
